blended.narrative: Northstar is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
